description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named esp32c2 that runs on workflow dispatch and push to the master branch. Use an ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, verifies the existence of ci/ci-compile, sets up Python 3.11, installs dependencies with pip, runs a pre-build step with ci/ci-compile.py, copies board JSON files, and then builds for the ESP32-C2 board using ci/ci-compile.py.
